set(TBB_BUILD_STATIC ON CACHE BOOL "Build static lib" FORCE)
set(TBB_BUILD_SHARED OFF CACHE BOOL "Build SHARED LIB" FORCE)
set(TBBMALLOC_BUILD ON CACHE BOOL "TBBMALLOC_BUILD" FORCE)
set(TBBMALLOC_PROXY_BUILD OFF CACHE BOOL "TBBMALLOC_PROXY_BUILD" FORCE)
set(TBB_TEST OFF CACHE BOOL "TBB_TEST" FORCE)
set(TBB_INSTALL OFF CACHE BOOL "Enable installation" FORCE)

add_subdirectory(tbb)

set_property(TARGET tbb PROPERTY FOLDER "ThirdParty")
set_property(TARGET tbbmalloc PROPERTY FOLDER "ThirdParty")
